result:
The data cleaning and harmonization process has been successfully completed. The cleaned dataset containing the harmonized household weekly income variables has been saved as 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv' with 16,111 rows. The output includes the following variables:
- NSID (cohort member identifier)
- incwhh14, incwhh15 (banded income for ages 14 and 15)
- incwhhcnt14, incwhhcnt15 (continuous income for ages 14 and 15)
- incwhh16, incwhh17 (banded income for ages 16 and 17)

All variables have been properly recoded with standardized missing value codes and appropriate factor levels with descriptive labels.
